title: Grateful for the strategy — not huge gains, but a meaningful step
author: Swimming-Salary9550
selftext:
Not a huge win, but definitely a meaningful one for me.

Tried a simple strategy I’ve been experimenting with recently, and it worked better than expected this past week — up about $8.4K (\~15%).

I know this isn’t life-changing money, and one good week doesn’t prove anything long-term. But for me, it’s more about seeing progress and gaining confidence in the process.

Still working on consistency, risk control, and not getting carried away after a good run.

Curious how others here approach validating a strategy over time — how many trades or weeks before you trust it?
